lookup_rule: Read this catalog first, choose the dataset covering the requested UTC date and cadence, then read that dataset index and one daily JSONL/GZIP file.

coordinate_model.time_scale: UTC input, Julian Day UT output

recommended_cadence_policy.use: broad daily overview and coarse scans
ordinary chart-position lookup and match start windows
exact-time match windows and final checks

planned_extensions: larger generated historical ranges outside the default branch

datasets.description: Small default-branch example dataset. Full generated ranges are listed as separate catalog entries when available.

large_dataset_policy: Full historical ranges should be published outside the default branch, for example in data-only repositories, releases, or static object storage.
